title: phaius × gravesii
intro: Phaius × gravesii, also known as the Grave's orchid or hybrid orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Phaius × gravesii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to promote digestion and relieve stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and processed into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
